◎简　　介  

　　A tale of murder in small-town Kansas. When Jimmy is lured away from his abusive family by a traveling sideshow carnival, he encounters Sandra, one of the main attractions. The happiness they find together causes them to confront the darkness in their lives.http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0204322/usercommentsOne of the best detective noirs I've seen.The most bleak film I've seen...
